case_title: JENNIFER HELLAWELL VS. EXPERT HOME BUILDERS, INC

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2022 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT EXPERT HOME BUILDERS, INC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HELLAWELL, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT EXPERT HOME BUILDERS, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-14-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER HELLAWELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXPERT HOME BUILDERS, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RUSTI COLIN, PRODUCTION MANAGER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $3565 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-14TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-14-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-14-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER HELLAWELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HELLAWELL, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXPERT HOME BUILDERS, INC $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-09-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EXPERT HOME BUILDERS, INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HELLAWELL, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT EXPERT HOME BUILDERS, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPERT HOME BUILDERS, INC
